title:
PENTHOUSE GROOVE NEW DJ VIDEO🎧
【spring high】

seventh heaven fusion & latin jazz


今回は「Ramsey Lewis - Spring High」から「Rainbow Featuring Will Boulware - I Like It」への繋ぎのシーンをお届け。
春の暖かな日差しを浴びながらどこへ出かけたくなるような、春らしい高揚感のある楽曲をお楽しみください。

This time, we’re bringing you the transition scene from “Ramsey Lewis - Spring High” to “Rainbow Featuring Will Boulware - I Like It.”
Enjoy these uplifting springtime tracks that make you want to head out somewhere under the warm spring sunshine.


Listen To MyTube!
